query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'store_settings' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'landingDesign';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Pj14a2EnUFM8XE.root --database NZpifSW9BTrd6QobKPrRSL --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'store_settings' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'landingDesign';
